mapper.update: UPDATE mcp_gateway_tool SET protocol_id = #{protocolId}, protocol_type = #{protocolType}, update_time = NOW() WHERE gateway_id = #{gatewayId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, gateway_id, tool_id, tool_name, tool_type, tool_description, tool_version, protocol_id, protocol_type, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_gateway_tool WHERE gateway_id = #{gatewayId}
SELECT protocol_id FROM mcp_gateway_tool WHERE gateway_id = #{gatewayId} and tool_name = #{toolName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mcp_gateway_tool (gateway_id, tool_id, tool_name, tool_type, tool_description, tool_version, protocol_id, protocol_type) VALUES (#{gatewayId}, #{toolId}, #{toolName}, #{toolType}, #{toolDescription}, #{toolVersion}, #{protocolId}, #{protocolType}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE tool_name = #{toolName}, tool_type = #{toolType}, tool_description = #{toolDescription}, tool_version = #{toolVersion}, protocol_id = #{protocolId}, protocol_type = #{protocolType}, update_time = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT id, gateway_id, tool_id, tool_name, tool_type, tool_description, tool_version, protocol_id, protocol_type, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_gateway_tool
SELECT id, gateway_id, tool_id, tool_name, tool_type, tool_description, tool_version, protocol_id, protocol_type, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_gateway_tool WHERE gateway_id = #{gatewayId}

SELECT id, gateway_id, tool_id, tool_name, tool_type, tool_description, tool_version, protocol_id, protocol_type, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_gateway_tool
AND gateway_id like concat('%', #{gatewayId}, '%')
AND tool_id like concat('%', #{toolId}, '%')
AND tool_name like concat('%', #{toolName}, '%')
ORDER BY update_time DESC
LIMIT #{limitStart}, #{limitCount}

SELECT count(id) FROM mcp_gateway_tool
AND gateway_id like concat('%', #{gatewayId}, '%')
AND tool_id like concat('%', #{toolId}, '%')
AND tool_name like concat('%', #{toolName}, '%')
